question_text:
Permutations

Given an array nums of distinct integers, return all the possible permutations. You can return the answer in any order.
input_format: A single line of space-separated integers (all distinct).
output_format: The count of all possible permutations (n!).
constraints: All the integers of nums are unique.
explanation: We use backtracking with a visited/swap approach. At each recursion depth, we try placing each remaining unused element at the current position. We track used elements, recurse for the next position, and backtrack by removing the element. The total number of permutations of n distinct elements is n! (factorial). The backtracking explores all n! branches and each branch runs in O(N) time to copy the result, giving O(N × N!) total time complexity.
